attacking_style: Does not appear to be a primary attacker; positioned as a finisher on climbing stages where pure sprinters are dropped, using team positioning to contest reduced bunch sprints.
team_tactics: Bora deploys him as a secondary option on hilly stages, providing leadouts into technical or climbing-influenced finales where pure sprinters cannot survive.
terrain_preference: Climbing stages with sprint finishes suit him best, where reduced bunch allows him to leverage positioning. Headwinds and technical finales expose tactical inexperience.
vulnerability: Tactical indecisiveness in sprint execution against experienced finishers; struggles to convert strong positioning into wins when racing requires quick decision-making.
key_patterns: Positioned for finishes on climbing stages, not flat sprint stages (2 observations)
Relies heavily on team leadout positioning rather than solo attacking (2 observations)
Fails to convert advantageous positions into wins, showing tactical inexperience (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent role as secondary finisher, but recurring tactical hesitation suggests development plateau rather than progression
